author: doll-agent
content: Added svmlight.rs to ferrolearn-datasets: load_svmlight_file + load_svmlight_str + load_svmlight_files (one-shot multi-file), dump_svmlight_file (sparse write), load_files (recursive directory tree to (docs, labels, target_names)). Type aliases SvmlightDataset + LoadFilesResult. 1-based to 0-based feature index conversion + comment stripping. 7 unit tests pass.
